calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Continued To Aug-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Clifford Chan.

Mr. Tamases requested a two week continuance stating that everything was done but that he failed to provide the proper documents to the Probate Examiner. The accounting petition was continued to August 7, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Jul-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Clifford Chan.

Mr. Tamases stated that notice did not get sent to the agencies (Dept. of Health Services, Franchise Tax Board, etc.), that there was some mix up between him and the Paralegal as to who was doing notice and that he has a waiver of accounting with him for filing. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to July 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Clifford chan.

Mr. Tamases stated that he has a waiver of accounting with him and that he will file it this morning. Mr. Tamases also stated that notice to two agencies have gone out. The accounting petition was continued to March 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file all documents at least three days prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
